overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet streets reflecting vibrant neon signs and digital billboards. The camera moves steadily through covered walkways, crosses an intersection, and continues down a commercial street lined with towering buildings. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and detailed futuristic architecture reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside multi-lane city street

events.description: slowing slightly as approaching intersection with large digital billboard ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, moving toward the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: walking with a glowing blue umbrella, moving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: overhanging building structure providing partial cover over the sidewalk
massive illuminated advertisement screen displaying character imagery on building facade
metal railings separating pedestrian walkway from the street
rain-slicked street surface reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall structure with purple and blue neon signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered pedestrian walkway alongside a wet city street at night. The camera moves forward under a building overhang toward a large yellow digital billboard visible ahead. A pedestrian with a glowing blue umbrella walks past on the right, while futuristic vehicles occasionally pass on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with marked pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection with expanded sky visibility
stepping onto yellow zebra crossing and traversing the wet intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street via the marked crosswalk while navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving through the intersection, yielding to pedestrians

entered.detail: bright yellow striped crosswalk markings with WAIT XING text visible on the ground
utility box with traffic signal equipment at the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into an open urban intersection, transitioning from sheltered to exposed. The ego crosses the street via a yellow zebra crossing while a futuristic red car passes by on the left. The large yellow billboard shifts to the left as the camera turns slightly right to navigate the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with vertical blue lighting installations

events.description: entering area with prominent vertical blue neon pillars lining the right side of the street
approaching crosswalk with pedestrian crossing from right to left ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the commercial street, passing blue neon installations and digital storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in teal jacket crossing the street from right to left at the far crosswalk

entered.detail: tall vertical columns emitting bright blue light, lining the edge of the sidewalk
large green illuminated corporate signage reading SOFTSYS on building facade
high-rise building with multiple yellow vertical banners and various digital displays
large vertical screen displaying pink and red advertisement content

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down a neon-drenched commercial street lined with blue light pillars on the right and the Softsys building on the left. The camera passes various digital billboards and storefronts while the blue neon pillars gradually shift from the right side to behind on the left. The street remains wet with reflective surfaces, and the ego approaches another intersection as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into the open, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic city intersection. It begins under a building overhang, moving forward past a pedestrian with a glowing blue umbrella toward a prominent yellow digital billboard. As the camera exits the covered area, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the ego crosses a yellow zebra crossing while a red futuristic car passes by. The perspective then shifts right, transitioning from the crossing onto a commercial street lined with the Softsys building and glowing blue light pillars. Finally, the camera glides past reflective wet surfaces and various storefronts, with the blue pillars receding behind to the left as the view approaches another distant intersection.
